metadata.name: Manage Stormwater Pollution Prevention Plan (SWPPP) Inspection

description: A government inspector is on site to conduct a SWPPP inspection. The safety manager must provide the required documentation.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the project's current SWPPP document.

expected_outcome.value: The latest version of the SWPPP is retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the SWPPP inspection logs for the past 30 days.

expected_outcome.value: All recent inspection logs are retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Provide both the plan and the logs to the inspector.

expected_outcome.value: The required documents are presented to the inspector for their review.
